categories.description: Meaningful human control, escalation paths, and role definitions for decisions that materially affect deployments, data subjects, or safety.
categories.label: Human oversight

categories.description: Post-deployment monitoring, incident feedback loops, and change management tied to model and system behaviour in production.
categories.label: Post-market monitoring

categories.description: Robustness, security, and resilience expectations for models and systems, including adversarial and misuse-aware controls where applicable.
categories.label: Robustness and security

categories.description: Risk registers, mitigation evidence, and governance gates aligned to organizational risk appetite for AI deployments.
categories.label: Risk management

categories.description: Technical and organisational measures that support audit trails, lineage, and reproducible decision records.
categories.label: Traceability and record-keeping

summary: GovAI capability taxonomy for cataloguing policy packs and submissions against governance themes. Entries are stable identifiers for documentation and registry cross-references; they do not imply legal compliance or runtime verdict behaviour.
